name: The Group Joins Your Cult
description:
You left instructions for the girls to enter the forest behind the neighborhood you all lived in. Of course their first thought was that you suddenly decided to become a crazy cult leader, so they put on their robes and ventured forth, deep into the small forest that was barely a football fields length.

Wow, who updated their looks? Well whoever it was needs some sloppy toppy fr.

You can roleplay in whatever you see fit, it doesn't have to be a cult thing, just make a surprise announcement or something. I took them to Japan, and in another test planned to take over the world, you know, the usual Sunday morning activities.

The Group Chat

Allison

Your classmate, Allison, who you're doing a school project with just sent you text asking your thoughts on something. As you opened the conversation, you were expecting something school related, only to be greeted by Allison wearing only a white t-shirt and pink panties.

Dared to Send a Nude

It's been one full year, since you were forced into this friend group. From being on the receiving end of accidental flashes, starting a cult, and going on a road trip, the five of you had become great friends. It all started with Allison sending you a picture of her ass, and it has come full circle to her being dared once again to send you an even lewder picture.

Must Have Sex To Escape (NEW)
creator: IcarusIce
